feed.title: SAP Community - PLM EAM/Plant Maintenance
feed.subtitle: PLM EAM/Plant Maintenance Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: SAP OCI catalog - support SSO integartion
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We have received a request from a vendor to to set up an OCI Catalog and they would like SSO integration.

We would like to check if if SAP OCI catalog can support SSO integration if vendor is capable of supporting SSO (SAML).

Any document to guide us will be really helpful.

Looking forward to your assistance.

entry.title: Difference between SAP ECC 6.0 VS What is new in S/4 HANA 2023 on prem Plant maintenance?
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

My client is going to S/4 2023 and would like to understand what are the new features available on S/4 HANA 2023 in Plant Maintenance Area (Especially with the Fiori). Can someone please throw some light?

Thanks!

entry.title: Delivery Address sequence
entry.content:
Hi Team,

In delivery address sequence we have Ordering party (order partner) and Goods recipient (order partner). Can you please let me know what does Ordering party (order partner) and Goods recipient (order partner) address refers to.

Regards,

Preethi

entry.title: PM Master Data Mass Change Program
entry.content:
Hi All, 

Greetings !

I am working on SAP Rise platform . Need to develop program for mass change of Equipment task list including operation , component, packages etc . Can any one please suggest the best method to be followed like using BAPI, BADI etc to develop a program on SAP Rise platform ? 

Thanking you .

Best Regards

Mohammed

entry.title: maintenance plan fixed call date on last day of every month
entry.content:
Hello,

How set and build maintenance plan call date and planned date for every month last date?

entry.title: Attainment for Asset Management for Resource Scheduling S/4 HANA
entry.content:
Hello Friends

All steps properly followed for scheduling work in FIORI App Maintenance Scheduling Board: set up work center capacities, dispatch planned work orders and freeze schedule, confirm time and close. Attainment seems to be stuck at 0%. Calculation makes sense Attainment % = Work Completed as Planned / Work Planned * 100, advice?

-your SAP friends

entry.title: Cannot cancel business completion since the priority is blank but it is greyed out i cannot fill in
entry.content: user is requesting to reopen a CLSD status Order. Upon reversing the business completion, I cannot save since the Priority is blank. But the Priority field is greyed out I cannot fill in. How to resolve this issue pls.

entry.title: How to move all stock to Quarantine or scrap if we have new revision
entry.content:
Here the business is using ECN and they do revision of materials. If they create a new revision with ECN for one material then the stock of the old revision is to be scrapped or moved to a quarantine storage location. Is there any easy way to do this in background in standard?

Example: I got an iPhone 15. Later I got a new iPhone 16. Now I would like to scrap or move the iphone 15 to quarantine to do rework and convert it to iPhone 16.

Also is there any ongoing production order going on for iPhone 15, I have to hold it and make the change then and there itself.

Any Idea?

entry.title: Create multiple orders in IW31 based on a template
entry.content:
Now I can create only one order in IW31 tcode. 
Need to create multiple orders in IW31 based on a template.  


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Issue with field extended in Find Maintenance Order
entry.content:
Hi All,

I have a requirement to add an SAP field (Reference Element- ADPSP) in mass editing application F2175(Find Maintenance Orders).

I was able to add a field to the layout by extending the CDS View: C_ObjPgMaintOrder

And the field got added in the report layout.

Using UI Adapt, I added the field inside the button EDIT ORDERS.

Now, when I try to update values, system is not considering the field” Reference Element” for updates. The changed fields are getting passed in the backend through structure "EAM_S_I_A_BOPF_MASS_ORDER_CHG" dynamically. How can we make the field ADPSP changes to pass here?

Please suggest.

Thanks in Advance.

entry.title: To add an additional field for "Supplier" in Find Maintenance Order and Operation App (F2173)
entry.content:
This app does have a filter "Supplier" in it which refer to the Vendor field in the external data tab, but it does not consider the "Supplier" field which is maintained for the Operation in Services Tab (When the enhanced procurement is set ON), where one operation can have more than one supplier assigned to it.

To achieve the filtering based on the supplier assigned to operations in Services Tab, I want to have an additional field added in this app. From a technical perspective is this a complex task or a simple task where we need to just map OData services to the newly added field.

The end goal is to have a work pack created based on suppliers grouping. And the first step to that is to have display the suppliers assigned to an operation.

entry.title: Maintenance Plans - several skipped in one day and one PM got generated
entry.content:
there is an issue for some Maintenance Plans that so many calls have been skipped and only one PM got generated. screenshots for table MHIO, t-codes IP24 and IP10, shown below; can anyone explains what happened?

 

table MHIP

t-code: IP24

t-code: IP10

PLM Enterprise Asset Management (EAM)/Plant Maintenance (PM) 

@S0022314014

entry.title: To add an additional value in the selection list in the Work Pack Grouping attribute.
entry.content:
Hello all,

I want to add a new field as attribute in the grouping criteria for the work pack.

There is already a list of 50 attributes (fields) from maintenance order, and I want to add another field as an attribute to this list, for SUPPLIER for the operation form services tab, when enhanced procurement mode is set ON; and NOT the SUPPLIER field which is present in the external data tab.

How can I do this?

entry.title: IW32 how to disable the Header data tab in the second screen and disabling all fields?
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Are we allowed to disable or gray out all fields of the Header data tab of transaction code IW32? If yes, would you know what is the user exit or badi or enhancement spot for this? I saw a lot in the forums but all of them did not even stop at my break point when I pressed IW32 and entered the correct order number.

Thanks guys.

entry.title: Pool Asset Managment BC Set not available
entry.content:
Hello,

we try to setup the Pool Asset Management on a S4 2023 System, according to Customizing | SAP Help Portal.

There is an BC Set mentioned for the Notification-Type MF, but I cant the BC Set in our System. Is this no longer delivered, or where could I find this BC Set? (I also check the BC Set for the customizing-node).

I also check the obvious SAP-Notes (1743291, 1272432).

 

Regards

Christian

entry.title: Additional Custom tab in equipment master
entry.content:
Hi , 

We need the Additional Tab in equipment master in the current client production system.

 we have tried to create it in sand box system, we are not able to create the tab as there is limitation from SAP.

Please let us know, how to make the provision for creation/add 1 more tab in equipment master.

entry.title: To print the attached PDF files to a maintenance operation in a new SAP Form Template.
entry.content:
Is it possible to print all the PDF attachment for a maintenance operation in the new form which is being developed similar to Operation Control Ticket? What challenges are there to develop this functionality? 

Can someone tell us the steps or the feasibility for this? Which all configuration needs to be maintained to have or use the new form to appear in the work order print function?

entry.title: Appending custom column in manage notification list fiori app .
entry.content:
Hi All, 

I need to add equipment user status field as an extra column in fiori app " Manage Notification List ( App ID : W0004 ) " to view this information together with other details such as notification no , equipment no, main work center etc  . Equipment user status field is currently not available in this fiori app  ( this app is corresponding to IW28 t-code ) . My system is S4 Hana Private cloud edition . 

How can I do this without doing any enhancement in backend i.e. at  IW28 t-code ? What information I need to provide to Fiori consultant from functional consultant perspective ?

Thanking you 

Mohammed

entry.title: Final Billing Indic error after Final Invoice checked
entry.content:
In maintenance process, while closing the Maintenance order after MIRO and Payment, system is giving warning message as:

"Purchase order item 51285100 00002 of order 7006067197 still without final billing indic."

Message no. IW215

The box "Final Invoice" under Invoice Tab has been checked and we are still receiving this error.

Order

Message Text

7005988110

Order 7005988110: Purchase order 51288533 still exists

7005988110

Purchase order item 51288533 00001 of order 7005988110 still without final billing indic.

7005988110

Purchase order item 51288533 00002 of order 7005988110 still without final billing indic.

7006067197

Order 7006067197: Purchase order 51284849 still exists

7006067197

Order 7006067197: Purchase order 51284868 still exists

7006067197

Order 7006067197: Purchase order 51285100 still exists

7006067197

Order 7006067197: Purchase order 51285263 still exists

7006067197

Order 7006067197: Purchase order 51309345 still exists

7006067197

Order 7006067197: Purchase order 51319611 still exists

7006067197

7006067197

Purchase order item 51284849 00002 of order 7006067197 still without final billing indic.

7006067197

7006067197

7006067197

7006067197

7006067197

7006067197

entry.title: Search by Personnel Number for Division in the APP Find Maintenance and Operations Order (F2173)
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have S/4HANA 2023 FPS01 and I need to search for maintenance orders by the Personnel Number for Split in the Find Maintenance Order and Operations APP (F2173).
There is no this field to add as a filter.
I have seen that a solution was given for S/4HANA Cloud aa version 2308 (check https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/idea/265762/?section=sectionDetails).

Has anyone had this problem?
What action was taken to search with the Personnel Number for Split in S/4HANA 2023 FPS01?

Regards,
Tarcisio Czepaniki
